overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a vibrant tribal settlement built on wooden stilts and platforms. The character walks continuously through various zones including waterfront areas, market squares with large pottery, and cliffside paths overlooking the ocean, interacting with a lush environment featuring colorful tribal decorations and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront entry with spiky tribal gate and green pools

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden platforms near green water, approaching a large spiky tribal structure

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing watch at the top of wooden stairs

entered.detail: large decorative structure with red and blue crystalline spikes forming an archway
shallow pool with emerald green water reflecting the wooden structures
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway
tribal dwelling elevated on wooden stilts with thatched roofing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the edge of a tribal village waterfront, featuring a distinctive spiky gate with red and blue crystalline decorations. The character walks forward on wooden platforms alongside green pools of water, approaching stairs where a tribal guard stands watch in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central market square with large pottery and vendors

events.description: ascends wooden stairs and enters open market area with large decorated pottery

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and walking through market square, passing vendors and large pottery basins

notable_agents.action: vendor stirring contents of a large decorated clay basin with a wooden paddle

entered.detail: massive clay bowls with blue and white geometric patterns, some containing goods
wooden structure with hanging goods and tribal wares displayed
flame providing warm light to the market area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs into a bustling market square filled with large decorated pottery and tribal vendors. The area is moderately crowded with NPCs standing near their stalls, and burning torches provide warm accent lighting to the wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing to elevated grassy terrace

events.description: crosses wooden bridge and enters grassy terrace area with ocean view appearing in distance

agents.ego_description: crossing a wooden bridge and walking through a grassy terrace area with scattered vegetation

entered.detail: elevated walkway with rope railings spanning between platforms
patches of green grass growing between wooden planks
distant glimpse of blue ocean and coastline visible between structures

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge with rope railings, transitioning from the market to a more open terrace area with patches of grass. The ocean becomes visible in the far distance to the right as the character continues along the elevated path.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper village market with hanging woven baskets and cliffside ocean views

events.description: passes under hanging woven basket decorations with ocean vista becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through upper village area, examining market stalls and passing under hanging decorations with ocean views

notable_agents.action: seated vendor tending to blue glowing items displayed on a wooden mat

entered.detail: large spherical baskets suspended from wooden beams overhead, woven with natural fibers
narrow dirt trail along the edge of a cliff with wooden railings
wooden stall with colorful fabrics and hanging wares

segments.scene_description: The character explores an upper village market area characterized by large woven baskets hanging overhead. The path runs along a cliffside with the ocean now clearly visible to the right. A seated vendor tends to glowing blue items at a stall on the left as the character passes through the shaded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook path with panoramic ocean and mountain views

events.description: turns left along cliffside path revealing expansive ocean vista and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path with ocean views to the right, passing additional market areas

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks visible across the water in the distance
expansive view of the coastline with turquoise water and rocky shores

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the cliffside path as it turns left, revealing an expansive panoramic view of the ocean and distant mountains. The character continues walking along the narrow dirt trail with the coastline visible to the right, passing additional tribal structures and hanging decorations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the gated waterfront of a tribal village up toward an expansive cliffside overlook of the ocean. It begins at a spiky gate adorned with red and blue crystals, moving across wooden platforms beside green pools toward a distant guard. As the character ascends a set of stairs, the environment shifts into a bustling market square filled with decorated pottery and warm torchlight before transitioning across a rope bridge onto an open, grassy terrace. The scene then opens further as the camera passes under hanging woven baskets and by a vendor with glowing blue items, with the ocean gradually becoming visible to the right. Finally, the path turns left along a narrow dirt trail, revealing a panoramic vista of the coastline and distant mountains framed by tribal decorations.
